reviews.comment:
La oficina de ACA cierra algunos sábados y en ningún lado está informado.
Personal de playa, regular. Personal de seguridad Pésimo.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA office is closed on some Saturdays, and this is not indicated anywhere. Beach staff: average. Security staff: terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvaUp1d3VnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargué combustible 2 veces en enero 2019. Me insumió unos 45 minutos de espera cada uno.
Es muy lento el proceso de carga y pago con tarjeta de débito/crédito.

(Translated by Google)
I fueled up twice in January 2019. Each time I waited about 45 minutes.
The fueling process and paying with a debit/credit card are very slow.

reviews.comment:
El local de venta parece estar como una obligación del contrato del ACA, pero sin vocación de prestar un servicio. NO ABRE LOS DOMINGOS. Los baños tienen, con suerte, un repaso; no se lucen por su limpieza, cuando están sin el debido cuidado los cierran, ponen un tacho en la entrada y, salvo molesta insistencia, no permiten el paso.  El lugar tiene mucho transito para la carga de combustible, hay detalles  mínimos que deben cuidarse, en definitiva es un servicio del AUTOMOVIL CLUB a sus socios, que, en el caso, no se presta.

(Translated by Google)
The service station seems to exist merely as a contractual obligation of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), without any real commitment to providing a service. It is closed on Sundays. The restrooms are, at best, given a quick clean; they're not exactly spotless, and when they're not properly maintained, they're closed, a trash can is placed at the entrance, and, unless you insist, no one is allowed in. The area sees heavy traffic for refueling, and there are minor details that should be taken care of. Ultimately, it's a service the Automobile Club provides to its members, which, in this case, is not being delivered.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaGZpMDZ3RRAB
